creator: tom.foxwell@simulnetic.com
text:
Compiling lsof-4.93.2_12,8 from ports results in the following error being thrown:

FATAL ERROR: can't read /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_lockf.c
FATAL ERROR: ./lockf_owner.h creation failed (see 00FAQ)

Unfortunately no log file is created at /usr/ports/sysutils/lsof/work/lsof-4.93.2/config.log
